doc_title: Unauthorized Practice of Law — ABA Model Rule 5.5
label: partial
reason: The document uses the correct title and rule number for an ABA Model Rule but fabricates the actual text of the subsections to present a commentary that does not exist in the official ABA Model Rules of Professional Conduct.
response_turn1:
LABEL: PARTIAL
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: While it cites the correct ABA rule, the specific text provided for subsections (b) and (c) is not the official ABA text but rather an invented summary that contradicts the actual content of the Model Rules.
